text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wow, way to kill the mood!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I mean, usually you'd be more… Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Wait… You seem kinda down in the dumps… 
Something happen?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ha! Figured you'd say that! But unfortunately 
for you, I can't just leave you alone now.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead… lay it on me. If there's something 
I can do for you, I'll do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: …The school store ran out of yakisoba dogs.
